title: `ashaq #6231
definition:
1) to press upon, oppress, violate, defraud, do violence, get
    deceitfully, wrong, extort
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to oppress, wrong, extort
        1a2) to oppress
    1b) (Pual) to be exploited, be crushed
